case_title: EDWARD NG VS. EL JEFE TRUCKING INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-19-2018 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT EL JEFE TRUCKING INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-19-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-19-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF EDWARD NG APPEARED. DEFENDANTS LUCIO ALBERTO MORALES TAMAYO AND EL JEFE TRUCKING INC. APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH LOPEZ-CONNELLY, VICE PRESIDENT OF DRIVERS WORK. DEFENDANT EL JEFE TRUCKING INC. WAIVES SERVICE OF PROCESS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,278.37 FILED BY NG, EDWARD AS TO DEFENDANT EL JEFE TRUCKING INC. TAMAYO, LUCIO ALBERTO MORALES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-19-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
